query:
-- Add Abdur as founder in caller_profiles so Alex immediately recognizes him
-- Phone number will be updated when he calls (we use his number from the call)
INSERT INTO caller_profiles (phone, name, role, shopName, shopCity, shopState, notes, callCount, doNotSell, lastCalledAt)
VALUES 
  ('+1PLACEHOLDER', 'Abdur', 'founder', 'Baylio', 'New Jersey', 'NJ', 'Founder and CEO of Baylio. Testing the system. Skip the sales pitch entirely. Treat as internal team member.', 0, false, NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = 'Abdur', role = 'founder';

-- Add Zabir from Autoblitz as a cold prospect
INSERT INTO prospects (ownerName, shopName, phone, address, city, state, zip, source, outreachStatus, notes)
VALUES 
  ('Zabir', 'Autoblitz', NULL, '125 Saddle River Ave', 'South Hackensack', 'NJ', '07606', 'manual', 'not_contacted', 'Real prospect. Owner of Autoblitz auto repair shop. Located at 125 Saddle River Ave, South Hackensack NJ 07606. Priority cold lead for personalized outreach.')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ownerName = 'Zabir', notes = 'Real prospect. Owner of Autoblitz auto repair shop.';
